creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Tue Aug 27 16:51:00 2013
New Revision: 325468
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/325468

Log:
  - Update to 2.34
  
  Changes:	http://dejavu-fonts.org/wiki/Changelog#Changes_from_2.33_to_2.34
  PR:		ports/181560
  Submitted by:	naddy

Modified:
  head/x11-fonts/dejavu/Makefile
  head/x11-fonts/dejavu/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/x11-fonts/dejavu/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-fonts/dejavu/Makefile	Tue Aug 27 16:25:55 2013	(r325467)
+++ head/x11-fonts/dejavu/Makefile	Tue Aug 27 16:51:00 2013	(r325468)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	dejavu
-PORTVERSION=	2.33
+PORTVERSION=	2.34
 CATEGORIES=	x11-fonts
 MASTER_SITES=	SF
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-fonts-ttf-${PORTVERSION}
@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@ MAINTAINER=	sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Bitstream Vera Fonts clone with a wider range of characters
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	fc-cache:${PORTSDIR}/x11-fonts/fontconfig
-RUN_DEPENDS=	fc-cache:${PORTSDIR}/x11-fonts/fontconfig
+RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS LINKS
 LINKS_DESC=	Install links of configuration files in conf.d

Modified: head/x11-fonts/dejavu/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-fonts/dejavu/distinfo	Tue Aug 27 16:25:55 2013	(r325467)
+++ head/x11-fonts/dejavu/distinfo	Tue Aug 27 16:51:00 2013	(r325468)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (dejavu-fonts-ttf-2.33.tar.bz2) = 82a5823a270715913af51915cc20594568f57afb7450abb989695d8808a4194d
-SIZE (dejavu-fonts-ttf-2.33.tar.bz2) = 4881324
+SHA256 (dejavu-fonts-ttf-2.34.tar.bz2) = d0a72c3ae99f5b8d7470daf091ec43f78dc942795aed5c996ab1aa678702eb5d
+SIZE (dejavu-fonts-ttf-2.34.tar.bz2) = 4706932
